description: Standard-scale a CSV, label it with K-Means at n_clusters=N_CLUSTERS, project to 2D with PCA, and render a labeled cluster scatter (clustering_results.png) annotated with explained variance and silhouette.
rules: read-only with respect to inputs; writes only under record_store
all numeric columns are used as features; data is standard-scaled first
PCA projects to 2 components for plotting; K-Means uses random_state=42, n_init=10
matplotlib runs headless (Agg backend) so no display is required
graceful: if scikit-learn is absent the porter still writes a valid non-empty JSON note
usage: Set DATA_CSV (numeric feature table). Optional: N_CLUSTERS (default 3). Output: cluster_visualization.json plus clustering_results.png.
limitation: Requires scikit-learn + matplotlib + pandas at runtime to render the plot; offline it degrades to a note. The 2D PCA view discards variance beyond the first two components.
